description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted in a standing pose with a slightly forward-leaning posture. The figure appears to be wearing a brimmed hat and a long overcoat, with the coat extending below the waist. The arms are positioned close to the body, and one hand is holding a cane, which is angled toward the ground. The overall silhouette is slender, and the legs are straight, suggesting a composed and upright stance. The figure's head is slightly tilted, and the hat adds a distinctive feature to the profile. The details are minimal, focusing on the general form and accessories rather than intricate facial or clothing textures.
description: A standing adult pedestrian wearing a brimmed hat and long overcoat, holding a cane in one hand. The figure has a slender build and an upright, composed posture.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a slight angle, showing the brimmed hat, long overcoat, and the cane extending diagonally from the hand.
description_view_1: A side profile view highlights the hat's brim, the straight posture, and the cane held vertically beside the figure.
description_view_2: This view shows the cane more prominently, with the figure's body and overcoat visible from a rear-side angle.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the full length of the overcoat and the cane, with the figure's head and hat seen from behind.
